inline_comments.message: would you explain why you changed this line?

The reason why I changed this is because this seems like a small bug since the result assigned to messageStr looks switched in an unintentional way. Before my change the result of the condition was:
if target is "server"
codeStr    = chefServerResult.code
messageStr = chefClientResult.message

after my change if target is "server":
codeStr    = chefServerResult.code
messageStr = chefServerResult.message

and for target "client"
codeStr    = chefClientResult.code
messageStr = chefClientResult.message

If this is in any way incorrect then please let me know
